message:
test(unit): expand dancing_links.rs inline tests from 13 to 56 (+43) (ft-2o2bl)

Cover edge cases: zero-column matrix, solve_limited=0, add_row bounds
checking, serde roundtrip, solve_all state restoration, 4-queens exact
cover encoding, clone independence, no-duplicate solutions, and more.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
